# boom-cdn

> Public component CDN for the Boom design system. 18 themes, 50+ components, motion engine. Zero build step — just link CSS and go.

Base URL: https://boom-cdn.vercel.app

## Quick Start

Pick a theme. Each theme auto-imports base.css (components + layout + utilities).

```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://boom-cdn.vercel.app/themes/neo-tokyo.css">
<body class="boom">
  <div class="b-container">
    <h1 class="b-h1">Hello</h1>
    <button class="b-btn b-btn-primary">Click</button>
  </div>
</body>
```

Optional: add motion effects (scroll reveal, typewriter, counter, parallax, tilt, magnetic).

```html
<script src="https://boom-cdn.vercel.app/themes/motion.js" defer></script>
<h1 data-reveal="slide-up">Animates on scroll</h1>
```

## Modules

| Module | What it does | Files |
|--------|-------------|-------|
| themes | UI framework: 18 color themes + 50+ component classes | `themes/{theme-id}.css` (auto-imports `themes/base.css`) |
| motion | Scroll reveal, typewriter, counter, marquee, parallax, tilt, magnetic | `themes/motion.js` |
| engine | Walkthrough narrator: step-by-step highlight + audio + keyboard | `engine/engine.css` + `engine/engine.js` |
| presenter | Slide presenter + optional comment overlay | `presenter/presenter.css` + `presenter/presenter.js` |
| viewer | Keyframe viewer, manifesto renderer, version index | `viewer/keyframe-viewer.css` + `viewer/keyframe-viewer.js` |

## Themes

Machine-readable catalog: https://boom-cdn.vercel.app/themes/catalog.json

18 themes, each a single CSS file. Usage: `<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://boom-cdn.vercel.app/themes/{id}.css">`

Dark: neo-tokyo, obsidian-velvet, matte-carbon, terminal-green, ocean-depth, copper-industrial, emerald-dynasty, aurora-gradient, frost-glass, golden-luxury, ink-editorial, forest-zen
Light: champagne-silk, soft-pastel, swiss-minimal, candy-pop, zen-ink, brutalist

## Components (all in base.css, shared by every theme)

Typography: `.b-display` `.b-h1`–`.b-h5` `.b-body` `.b-muted` `.b-subtle` `.b-label` `.b-mono` `.b-serif` `.b-accent`
Layout: `.b-container` `.b-section` `.b-grid` `.b-grid-2`–`.b-grid-4` `.b-flex` `.b-flex-col` `.b-center` `.b-between` `.b-stack`
Buttons: `.b-btn` `.b-btn-primary` `.b-btn-ghost` `.b-btn-outline` `.b-btn-danger` `.b-btn-sm` `.b-btn-lg` `.b-btn-group`
Cards: `.b-card` `.b-card-header` `.b-card-title` `.b-card-desc` `.b-card-footer` `.b-card-image` `.b-card-accent`
Forms: `.b-input` `.b-textarea` `.b-select` `.b-toggle` `.b-checkbox` `.b-radio` `.b-input-group` `.b-field`
Tags: `.b-badge` `.b-badge-success/warning/error/info` `.b-tag` `.b-chip` `.b-chip-group`
Data: `.b-table` `.b-table-wrap` `.b-list` `.b-list-item` `.b-stat` `.b-stat-value`
Nav: `.b-tabs` `.b-tab` `.b-navbar` `.b-breadcrumb` `.b-pagination` `.b-sidebar` `.b-switch-group`
Overlay: `.b-overlay` `.b-dialog` `.b-dropdown` `.b-toast` `.b-popover` `.b-sheet`
Feedback: `.b-alert` `.b-banner` `.b-spinner` `.b-progress` `.b-skeleton`
Advanced: `.b-avatar` `.b-steps` `.b-timeline` `.b-accordion` `.b-pricing` `.b-testimonial` `.b-hero` `.b-footer` `.b-meter` `.b-gallery` `.b-details` `.b-empty`
Utility: `.b-separator` `.b-code` `.b-kbd` `.b-truncate` `.b-hidden` `.b-scroll` `.b-grain` `.b-gap-2`–`.b-gap-8` `.b-mt-2`–`.b-mt-8` `.b-p-4`–`.b-p-8`

## Motion (motion.js)

All declarative via `data-` attributes. Auto-initializes on DOMContentLoaded.

| Effect | HTML | Options |
|--------|------|---------|
| Scroll reveal | `<div data-reveal="fade">` | Types: `fade`, `slide-up`, `slide-left`, `zoom`, `rotate`. `data-delay="200"` |
| Typewriter | `<span data-typewriter="Hello">` | `data-speed="50"` `data-cursor="true"` |
| Counter | `<span data-count data-target="1000">` | `data-duration="2000"` `data-suffix="%"` |
| Marquee | `<div class="b-marquee"><div class="b-marquee-inner">…</div></div>` | `data-speed="30"` `data-direction="right"` |
| Parallax | `<div data-parallax data-speed="0.3">` | speed: 0–1 |
| Tilt | `<div data-tilt data-tilt-max="10">` | max: degrees |
| Magnetic | `<button data-magnetic>` | — |

## Engine API

```js
SR.init({ steps, animations, audioDir, title, meta, device });
```

Methods: `SR.$(id)` `SR.wait(ms)` `SR.showSub(text)` `SR.hideSub()` `SR.playAudio(id)` `SR.glow(el)` `SR.unglow(el)` `SR.showScreen(id)` `SR.highlight(el, ms)` `SR.center(el)`
Keys: Space=play, ←→=nav, M=mute, R=read-mode, Esc=exit

## Full Docs

Complete API documentation: https://boom-cdn.vercel.app/docs.md
Theme catalog (JSON): https://boom-cdn.vercel.app/themes/catalog.json
Component source: https://boom-cdn.vercel.app/themes/base.css

## Rules

- Reference via CDN only — do not copy files locally
- CORS enabled for all origins
- Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable
- Every theme file auto-imports base.css — only link one CSS file
- `<body class="boom">` is required for theme styles to apply
